title: Final Comparative Evaluation (unpruned two-model pair)
provenance_note: This is a consolidation report. Every quality number below is copied from an existing measured artifact under output/ with the same vLLM serving stack on both sides. No new GPU eval was run for Phase 14 because there is no pruned variant and no shipped RL baseline to A/B against; re-running the vLLM wp-bench sweep would only reproduce output/sieve/optimal_k.json.

comparison_arms_status.pruned_variant: DOES NOT EXIST. Phase 13 verdict no_winner -> ship unpruned (human sign-off 2026-07-10). See output/prune/prune_methodology.md.
comparison_arms_status.v2_0_rl_baseline: DOES NOT EXIST as a shipped model. RL rejected Phase 10 (6/6 dead checkpoint reads, 2026-07-05). No RL checkpoint was promoted.
comparison_arms_status.effective_comparison: Shipping stack (v1.2 gen + v1.3 judge) measured full-arm vs its own acceptance bars; pruning/expert-drop recorded as a flat size line (no reduction achievable).

expert_drop_phase11.finding: E_eff ~88-99 live experts/layer of 128; k-sweep collapses wp-bench 0.4484(full)->0.2275(k64)->0.0546(k32); no swept k passes TOST epsilon=2pp. optimal_k=full.

weight_norm_aimer_phase13.finding: AIMER@25% collapses gen wp-bench to 0.1577 (bar 0.4284) and judge ensemble rho to 0.1651 (bar 0.7555), judge parse 44.6%. Both gates fail at the lightest ratio; 50/75% skipped and REAP conditional-skipped per pre-registered rule.

size_and_speed.size_reduction_vs_base: 0% (none). Expert-drop and weight-norm pruning both proved lossy; model ships at full 128-expert width. Size lever deferred entirely to Phase 15 quantization.
size_and_speed.inference_speed: Unchanged vs base Qwen3-30B-A3B. No parameters were removed, so per-token active-expert count (top-8 of 128, ~3.3B active) and therefore latency/throughput are architecturally identical to the base. No speedup was purchased by the v3.0 compression track; there was nothing to prune.

served_footprint.note: Two-model pair. Judge ensemble serves 3 checkpoints sequentially (median at end) per Phase 11 serving decision, or single-seed s1 fallback if 3x serve / GB10 memory is unacceptable.

verdict: RE-CONFIRMATION PASS. Shipping stack clears every applicable acceptance bar on the measured vLLM full arm. No pruned candidate and no RL baseline exist, so the planned A/B degenerates to a receipt against the shipping bars. Size is flat; Phase 15 quantization is the sole remaining size lever. Cleared to package.
